moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The final weekend of the 2026 Wimbledon Championships is underway, culminating in the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Finals on Saturday and Sunday.

angles.name: Centre Court Action
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! It's the final weekend of Wimbledon 2026. Who are you backing for the singles titles?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The buzz in SW19 is electric! Wimbledon's final weekend is here, bringing world-class tennis to London. Are you watching from home or soaking up the atmosphere?

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its practice days at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport on July 12, with tournament play running from July 16-19, 2026.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Returns
angles.copy: Golf's oldest major is back! Practice days for The Open Championship 2026 kick off tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who are your early picks for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Ready
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is primed and ready! The Open Championship 2026 starts its build-up tomorrow in Southport. Golf fans, get ready for a fantastic week!

moments.title: World Cup 2026 Intensifies
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, running until July 19, is in its gripping knockout stages, with teams battling for a place in the semi-finals and final.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup 2026 is heating up! Who's making it through to the next round? Every match is crucial now!

angles.name: Football Drama
angles.copy: Goals, drama, and heartbreak! The World Cup knockout stages are delivering. What's been your favourite moment so far?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival Live
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival is taking place today, July 11, 2026, at Alexandra Palace Park in London, featuring a mix of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Vibes
angles.copy: Alexandra Palace Park is buzzing today for Kaleidoscope Festival! If you're there, let us know what acts you're catching!

angles.name: London Festival Fun
angles.copy: Live music, comedy, and incredible views! Kaleidoscope Festival is bringing the good times to North London today. Who's enjoying the sunshine?

moments.title: Lost Minds Festival Today
moments.blurb: Lost Minds Festival is happening today, July 11, 2026, in Newcastle, bringing a day of electronic music and high energy to the North East.

angles.name: Newcastle Raves On
angles.copy: Lost Minds Festival is taking over Newcastle today! If you're living it up, send us your favourite tracks from the day!

angles.name: Dance Anthems North East
angles.copy: The North East is alive with the sound of Lost Minds Festival! Massive tunes and huge vibes in Newcastle today. Who's on the dancefloor?

moments.title: Boogietown Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Boogietown Festival is live today, July 11, 2026, in London, promising a day of disco, funk, and soul.

angles.name: Get Your Boogie On
angles.copy: Boogietown Festival is bringing the funk and soul to London today! Time to get your groove on.

angles.name: Disco in the City
angles.copy: London's getting its boogie on! Boogietown Festival is here today, filling the capital with disco anthems. What's your favourite disco classic?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is set to take place in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, from July 15-18, 2026.

angles.name: Celtic Sounds Calling
angles.copy: The stunning Outer Hebrides are calling! The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off on Wednesday. Who's heading north for the music?

angles.name: Scottish Festival Spirit
angles.copy: Get ready for four days of incredible music and culture! The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts mid-week in Stornoway. Tell us your favourite Scottish artists!

moments.title: Splendour Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, is happening from July 18-19, 2026, at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Nottingham's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is just a week away! Nottingham, who are you most excited to see at Wollaton Hall?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on for Splendour Festival in Nottingham! Two days of music, fun, and deer park vibes. What's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Make Chart History
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's duet 'Rein Me In' has spent its 16th week at number one on the UK Singles Chart, breaking Wet Wet Wet's 32-year record for a British act.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: History made on the UK Singles Chart! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is No. 1 for a record-breaking 16th week for a British act! Huge!

angles.name: Record Breakers
angles.copy: Move over, Wet Wet Wet! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean just broke a 32-year chart record. 'Rein Me In' for 16 weeks at No. 1 is massive. What's your favourite Sam Fender track?

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13 is currently airing nightly (except Saturdays) at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, with the series expected to conclude around late July.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another week, more drama in the Love Island villa! Who's coupled up, and who's heading for a dumping? Catch it tonight!

angles.name: Summer Romance
angles.copy: Summer isn't complete without Love Island! What's your favourite moment from this series so far?

moments.title: New Thriller 'The Dark' Premieres
moments.blurb: The gripping new crime thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premieres tomorrow, July 12, on ITV1 and ITVX.

angles.name: Dark & Twisty TV
angles.copy: Ready for a new Sunday night obsession? The Dark, a brand new crime thriller, lands on ITV1 and ITVX tomorrow. Looks intense!

angles.name: Sunday Night Thrills
angles.copy: Your weekend viewing sorted! The Dark promises a chilling new storyline set in the Scottish wilderness. Who's tuning in?

moments.title: 'Love is Blind: UK - After the Altar' S2
moments.blurb: Season 2 of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally on Netflix tomorrow, July 12, catching up with the cast post-pods.

angles.name: More Love is Blind
angles.copy: The pods are back! Well, kinda. 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 drops on Netflix tomorrow. What do you think happened next?

angles.name: Reality TV Catch-Up
angles.copy: Did they find lasting love or just drama? 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 is on Netflix tomorrow. Get ready for the updates!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 today, July 11.

angles.name: Celebrating Suzanne
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega! Still love 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner'. What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Singer-Songwriter Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega! Her timeless songs continue to captivate. What's your go-to Suzanne Vega moment?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Lil' Kim
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper Lil' Kim, a pioneering figure in hip-hop, celebrates her 51st birthday today, July 11.

angles.name: Queen Bee's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only Queen Bee, Lil' Kim! An absolute legend in hip-hop. What's your favourite Lil' Kim track?

angles.name: Hip Hop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of a true hip-hop icon, Lil' Kim, turning 51 today! Her influence is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Olly Alexander
moments.blurb: British singer and actor Olly Alexander, frontman of Years & Years and recent Eurovision representative, turns 35 on July 15.

angles.name: Years & Years of Talent
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 35th Birthday to the incredibly talented Olly Alexander! From Years & Years to Eurovision, he always delivers.

angles.name: Birthday Pop Star
angles.copy: Olly Alexander celebrates his 35th birthday on Wednesday! What's your favourite Years & Years hit?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Legendary American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, country, and pop, turns 79 on July 15.

angles.name: Ronstadt's Legacy
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt! A voice that defined generations. What's your top Linda Ronstadt song?

angles.name: Music Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of the legendary Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! Her impact on music is immense.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Luke Hemmings
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist for the Australian band 5 Seconds of Summer, turns 29 on July 16.

angles.name: 5SOS Frontman's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a rockin' Happy 29th Birthday to 5 Seconds of Summer's very own Luke Hemmings! What's your favourite 5SOS track?

angles.name: Pop-Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Cheers to Luke Hemmings of 5SOS, celebrating his 29th birthday on Thursday! Send him your best wishes!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the acclaimed drummer for the iconic band The Police, turns 74 on July 16.

angles.name: Police Drummer's Day
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the legendary Stewart Copeland of The Police! Those drum beats are still iconic. What's your favourite Police song?

angles.name: Rock Royalty Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of one of rock's greatest drummers, Stewart Copeland! Wishing him a fantastic 74th on Thursday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Geezer Butler
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and lyricist for heavy metal pioneers Black Sabbath, turns 77 on July 17.

angles.name: Metal God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Geezer Butler, the legendary bassist of Black Sabbath! A true heavy metal pioneer.

angles.name: Sabbath Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Black Sabbath's Geezer Butler on Friday! His riffs and lyrics shaped an entire genre.

moments.title: Happy Birthday M.I.A.
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, songwriter, and record producer Mathangi 'Maya' Arulpragasam, known as M.I.A., turns 48 on July 17.

angles.name: Celebrating M.I.A.
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to the innovative and influential M.I.A.! Her music always pushes boundaries. What's your favourite M.I.A. track?

angles.name: Global Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 48th birthday to the incredible M.I.A. on Friday! Her unique sound has left a huge mark.

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Kick Off
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays begin for many pupils across England and Wales around July 20, following earlier starts in Scotland and Northern Ireland.

angles.name: School's Out For Summer
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially beginning for many across the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Hello Summer Break
angles.copy: No more school runs for a while! Summer holidays are here for thousands of families. Time for adventures!
